definitions.text: A person living on adjacent or nearby land; a person situated adjacently or nearby; anything (of the same type of thing as the subject) in an adjacent or nearby position.
examples: My neighbour has two noisy cats.
They′re our neighbours across the street.

definitions.text: One who is near in sympathy or confidence.

examples: Though France neighbours Germany, its culture is significantly different.

definitions.text: To be similar to, to be almost the same as.
examples: That sort of talk is neighbouring on treason.

definitions.text: To associate intimately with; to be close to.
